elements.label: Description
elements.value: Controls how items bounce off each other and walls. Higher restitution = more bouncy. Position correction prevents overlap.

onChange.template:
[Gameplan: update .gameplan/physics/properties/collision.schema.json, set collt_restitution to {{collt_restitution}}]
Set restitution to {{collt_restitution}} in scripts/Constants.ts.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/physics/properties/collision.schema.json, set collt_pos_correction to {{collt_pos_correction}}]
Set position correction to {{collt_pos_correction}} in scripts/Constants.ts.
